title: Remove access denied from admin panel page

requirements.text: Fix the admin panel page so that authenticated admin users are never shown an 'access denied' message. The admin role check must use the authenticated actor (not an anonymous actor) and must wait for the authenticated identity to be fully initialized before evaluating admin privileges. Remove or bypass any premature access-denied rendering that occurs before authentication and role resolution are complete.

quotes: Remove access denied from admin panel page

acceptanceCriteria: An authenticated user with admin role can navigate to the admin panel without seeing any 'access denied' message.
The admin panel does not flash or render an 'access denied' state while authentication or role resolution is still loading.
The admin role query uses the authenticated actor, not the anonymous actor.
Non-admin authenticated users still see an appropriate denied/unauthorized message.
Unauthenticated users are prompted to log in rather than shown a permanent access denied error.

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui).
All Motoko backend logic must remain in the single main actor file.
nonGoals: Changing backend authorization logic or role definitions.
Redesigning the admin panel UI beyond fixing the access denied issue.
Modifying the registration or dashboard pages.
